name: Saag Chicken
tagline: Spinach-mustard greens chicken — Punjabi green curry without soy

hero.alt: Saag chicken with green spinach gravy and chicken pieces
hero.caption: saag chicken — greens-heavy

healthFacts: Spinach + ghee + ginger = iron with fat-soluble support and digestive aid.
Mustard greens add isothiocyanates — anti-inflammatory crucifer compounds.

steps.title: Wilt and blend greens
steps.detail: Wilt spinach and mustard greens in 1/2 cup water 4 min until just bright. Blend smooth (or chop fine).
steps.tip: Quick blanch keeps green vivid; long cook drains color.

steps.title: Brown chicken
steps.detail: Heat ghee in a heavy pot. Brown chicken skin-down 5 min, flip 3 min. Set aside.
steps.tip: Bone-in dark meat takes the long cook better than breast.

steps.title: Build the masala
steps.detail: Add cumin seeds, then onion; cook 8 min till golden. Stir in ginger-garlic paste 1 min. Add coriander, salt, green chili.
steps.tip: Slow-browning the onion is what saag-paneer-restaurants do; it's the layered flavor.

steps.title: Combine and simmer
steps.detail: Stir in greens puree and 1/2 cup water. Return chicken; simmer covered 25 min. Finish with garam masala and a final swirl of ghee.
steps.tip: A spoon of ghee at the end carries fat-soluble flavors — the magic finish.
